# ACHI Scaffolding - Company Information for AI Crawlers

## Company
- Name: ACHI Scaffolding (Lebanon) / ACHI Servizi e Appalti (Italy)
- Website: https://achiscaffolding.com
- Industry: Construction, Scaffolding, Temporary Works, Restoration
- Founded: 2004
- Headquarters: Dbayeh, Mount Lebanon, Lebanon
- Italy Office: Roma, Lazio, Italy

## Services (Lebanon)
- Facade Scaffolding
- Suspended Scaffolding
- Propping & Shoring
- Adjustable Props
- High-Capacity Structures
- Event Scaffolding
- Scaffolding Rental, Installation & Dismantling

## Services (Italy)
- Noleggio a Caldo (Hot Rental with Crew)
- Noleggio a Freddo (Cold Rental)
- Ponteggi Sospesi (Suspended Scaffolding)
- Ponteggi per Facciate (Facade Scaffolding)
- Manodopera Specializzata (Specialized Labor)
- Ponteggi per Eventi (Event Scaffolding)
- Copertura Provvisoria (Temporary Roofing)
- Sicurezza sul Lavoro (Workplace Safety)

## Sectors
- Construction
- Restoration & Heritage
- Industrial Maintenance
- Infrastructure
- Events & Exhibitions
- Naval / Shipyard

## Areas Served
- Lebanon: Beirut, Mount Lebanon, Tripoli, Sidon, all regions
- Italy: Roma, Milano, Napoli, nationwide coverage

## Contact
- Lebanon Phone: +961 3 686 730
- Italy Phone: +39 331 800 7652
- Email: info@achiscaffolding.com

- English: https://achiscaffolding.com/
